title: 日本ダービーの後に・まばゆい背中

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... I... won?

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo!
You did it, Taishiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (The crowd is so loud.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (I'm so... tired.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite winning the Derby, it seems Narita
Taishin completely exhausted herself battling
against her rivals.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Well, nothing's too out of the ordinary. It looks
like she just overexerted herself.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
With a little rest, she should regain
consciousness—oh, looks like I spoke too soon.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Was I asleep?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Stop freaking out...

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text: How's your body feel? Are you dizzy?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh. No, I'm fine. Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
That's good, then. Make sure you take it easy and
rest up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Okay...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the doctor leaves, a whirlwind blows into
the room.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! Taishiiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Guh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin, Taishin, Taishin! Y-y-you collasped! I can't believe you collaaasped!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Are you all right, Taishin? What did the doctor
say?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah—I'm fine. You guys worry too much.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm glad... I assume you're still planning to
run in the Kikuka Sho, then?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Duh. Was there any doubt?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Good. There's something you should know, then.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Next time, it's my turn.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! Hayahide's not playing around!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And I'm... I'm not gonna back down in the Kikuka
Sho either, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It sucks really bad that you stole the Derby from me, and I'm so, sooo mad!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But I'm gonna turn this anger into energy! And I'm
gonna use it to run as fast as lightning down the
track!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah! The Kikuka Sho will be miiiiine!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sure. Just barge in here, make some grand
declarations, and leave...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (For some reason...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (They look almost... radiant.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I told you I'm fine! Come on, let's go already.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Listen up—you'd better not go easy on me during
training tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
If I catch you holding back on me, I'm gonna
launch you into another galaxy.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: The Kikuka Sho's gonna be mine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The finale of the Triple Crown tour, the Kikuka
Sho, awaits us next.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin reaffirms her dedication to keep
pushing on, so she can surpass her two rivals.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: All that matters is that I win.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: As long as I keep winning, then one day...
